query:
ALTER TABLE courses 
  ADD COLUMN teacher varchar(255) AFTER name,
  ADD COLUMN totalHours varchar(50) AFTER scheduledAt,
  ADD COLUMN courseStatus enum('已完結','上線中','未開課') NOT NULL DEFAULT '未開課' AFTER totalHours,
  ADD COLUMN platform varchar(255) AFTER courseStatus,
  ADD COLUMN category enum('理財｜投資','商業｜工作學','內容創作｜行銷','自我成長','人際關係','數位工具｜AI','語言｜學習','健康｜身心靈','美妝｜保養','居家生活','法律｜知識') NOT NULL DEFAULT '自我成長' AFTER platform,
  ADD COLUMN syllabus text AFTER category,
  ADD COLUMN originalUrl text AFTER syllabus,
  ADD COLUMN imageUrl text AFTER originalUrl,
  ADD COLUMN ytLink text AFTER imageUrl,
  ADD COLUMN cloudLink text AFTER ytLink,
  DROP COLUMN status,
  DROP COLUMN link;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2MszHx5kdzDBeHj.root --database dXUckrobvf8MpmEcmPvpzD --execute 
ALTER TABLE courses 
  ADD COLUMN teacher varchar(255) AFTER name,
  ADD COLUMN totalHours varchar(50) AFTER scheduledAt,
  ADD COLUMN courseStatus enum('已完結','上線中','未開課') NOT NULL DEFAULT '未開課' AFTER totalHours,
  ADD COLUMN platform varchar(255) AFTER courseStatus,
  ADD COLUMN category enum('理財｜投資','商業｜工作學','內容創作｜行銷','自我成長','人際關係','數位工具｜AI','語言｜學習','健康｜身心靈','美妝｜保養','居家生活','法律｜知識') NOT NULL DEFAULT '自我成長' AFTER platform,
  ADD COLUMN syllabus text AFTER category,
  ADD COLUMN originalUrl text AFTER syllabus,
  ADD COLUMN imageUrl text AFTER originalUrl,
  ADD COLUMN ytLink text AFTER imageUrl,
  ADD COLUMN cloudLink text AFTER ytLink,
  DROP COLUMN status,
  DROP COLUMN link;
